name: Pumpkin Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugars.
2. Add egg yolks and mashed pumpkin to the mixture.
3. Sift flour, soda, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon into a separate bowl.
4. Alternately add the chopped nuts and dry ingredients to the creamed mixture with sour milk.
5. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
6. Pour the batter into two 8-inch layer pans lined with oiled paper at the bottom.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees Fahrenheit) for 25 minutes.
8. Allow the cakes to cool completely.
9. Assemble the cake layers using spiced whipped cream between each layer.
